political.s: FEC: $264K in executive political donations; partisan lean split across 14 executive donors.
political.amt: $60,000 Q4 2024 federal lobbying disclosed; $1.06M 2021-2022 federal PAC contributions

charity.s: $110M reported corporate giving in 2024 (~0.07% of revenue) via Elevance Health Foundation.
charity.focus: Maternal health, substance abuse, behavioral health, food security, health equity

privacy.s: 1 publicly-disclosed data breach per Have I Been Pwned (2015) — 79M accounts compromised. Most recent: Anthem (2015).

execPay.s: SEC litigation releases: 1 on record (insider trading, accounting fraud, or disclosure violations).

sampleRecalls.title: Giant Recalls Anthem X 29er Bicycles Due to Fall Hazard
sampleRecalls.description: This recall involves 2011 model year Giant Anthem X 29er 1, 2 and 3 model bicycles. The bicycles were sold in small, medium and large. "Giant" and the model name are printed on the bicycle.
hazards: The frame can crack at the junction of the seat post and top tube, posing a fall hazard to riders.

sampleRecalls.title: Trek Recalls Anthem C Elite Bicycle Helmets for Failing Impact Standards
sampleRecalls.description: The recalled helmets are identified by the model name Anthem C Elite and Anthem C Elite WSD. A label inside the helmet identifies the helmet as "Trek Anthem C." The helmets are available in men's sizes in black/charcoal, blue/silver and blue/red, and in women's sizes in aqua blue/silver and white/silver. This recall i…
hazards: Product testing has demonstrated that these helmets do not comply with CPSC safety standards for impact resistance. Consumers could suffer impact head injuries…
injuries: No incidents or injuries have been reported.
products: Trek Anthem C Elite and Anthem C Elite WSD Model Bicycle Helmets
